description: User-imported personal study material (e.g. ISACA Review Manual, Wiley CISA/CISSP guide, Sybex official study guide). STRUCTURAL ENFORCEMENT: internalOnly const true (Tier-C pattern from ADR-2605262400) — never projected to public MST feed, never accessible to LLM training, never shared between users. ownerDid is single-recipient (no multi-recipient at R0-R3). Owner-initiated hard delete on MST + IPFS pin release for right-to-erasure. License responsibility carried by the importing adherent (licenseAcknowledgment). Per ADR-2605264400.

titleHashed.description: sha256 of title (not the title text itself; minimizes leakage if record metadata enumerated)

encryptedPayloadCid.description: client-side XChaCha20-Poly1305 envelope per ADR-2605181100; CID points to encrypted blob on IPFS

internalOnly.description: STRUCTURAL — Tier-C carve-out per ADR-2605262400; any other value rejected

licenseAcknowledgment.description: adherent attestation of license basis for the imported material — religious-corp does not police, but records the attestation; misattestation is the adherent's individual responsibility
